---
name: Claim or credential update
about: Request a wording, claim, credential, or proof update
title: "Update claim: "
labels: trust, claims, site-quality
---

## Claim or wording to update

Paste the current wording or describe the claim.

## Why it needs updating

Explain what changed or what evidence is missing.

## Evidence source

Link or describe the evidence that supports the update.

## Claim safety checks

- [ ] The claim is accurate.
- [ ] The claim does not overstate budget, ownership, certification, clinical scope, or enterprise software expertise.
- [ ] The claim can be linked to the Proof Room, Claims Registry, a case study, or another evidence page.
- [ ] The update should be reflected in `llms.txt` if AI-readable wording changes.
